/usr/bin/ar qc libwlxbase_wlqt.a CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/wlxbase_wlqt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/FocusManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/PluginToolBar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/EditableGridWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/FindReplacePanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/ScopedFindReplacePanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/EncodingUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/FilterRowWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/FilterableHeaderView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/PluginStatusBar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/PluginSplitView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/ThemeManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/CrashLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wlxbase_wlqt.dir/src/SequentialRowProxyModel.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libwlxbase_wlqt.a
